items.title: Fonseca stuns Djokovic in third-round epic
items.summary: Novak Djokovic's wait for a record 25th Grand Slam singles title goes on after teenager Joao Fonseca produces a stunning fightback to win a five-set epic in the French Open third round.

items.title: Sooryavanshi's 96 in vain as Titans knock out Royals
items.summary: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi excels again in the IPL with a brilliant 96, but his Rajasthan Royals are beaten by Gujarat Titans who book their place in Sunday's final.

items.title: Cirstea makes history with 6-0 6-0 win
items.summary: Sorana Cirstea continues her remarkable form in the twilight of her career as she thrashes Solana Sierra 6-0 6-0 to reach the French Open fourth round.

items.title: FOTO Rudeš se vratio u HNL! Sezonu zaključio pobjedom  nad Sesvetama i velikom proslavom
items.summary: Rudeš je povratak u HNL osigurao u pretposljednjem kolu, a pobjedom u posljednjem na najbolji je mogući način zaključio sezonu. U elitu se vraća nakon dvije godine i sezone 2023./24.
